entries.definition:
f–t–ʾ to cease, to quieten, to become still. Of this root, تَفْتَأُ
taftaʾu, occurs once in the Qur’an.

تَفْتَأُ taftaʾu [imperf. of فَتِئَ fatiʾa, a sister of kāna (من أخوات كان)
(q.v.), with the negative particle ما or لا omitted], to continue
(12:85) تَاللَّهِ تَفْتَأُ تَذْكُرُ يُوسُفَ حَتَّى تَكُونَ حَرَضًا أَوْ تَكُونَ مِنَ الْهَالِكِينَ
by God!–
you will continue remembering/mentioning [lit. not cease to
remember] Joseph until you become extremely ill, or are of the
dead.
